positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration featuring a vibrant mountain range silhouette at sunset. The foreground includes stylized desert flora and geometric abstract shapes (triangles, arcs) suggesting natural energy flow. The palette should be limited to deep indigo, burnt orange, magenta, and charcoal gray, maintaining high contrast. Composition must be symmetrical and centered, perfect for a t-shirt print. Clean lines, flat vector aesthetic mixed with watercolor gradients for depth. Studio lighting, print-friendly, no gradients bleeding outside the frame.
negative: blur, artifact, text, signature, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, realistic photo, low resolution, noisy, cropped, logos, gradients bleeding
